title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 16–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Yamato, Big Mom as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the point of hitting me with a boulder?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There's nothing but ocean below! Zets, held!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's time for you to drop out!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Big Mom hurtles towards the surface!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 13 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
